reference_guide.description: Story-wide visual continuity bible. Must be a JSON object (not free-form prose) with at minimum the keys 'characters' and 'locations'. Each maps a name to an object holding the per-entity visual continuity facts the downstream stage_direction_* prompts will reuse for every scene.

characters.description: Map of character_name -> per-character visual continuity object (identity pack, costume, distinguishing features, narrator visibility, etc.). Empty object {} is valid when the story has no named characters.

locations.description: Map of location_name -> per-location visual continuity object (setting, lighting motif, palette, recurring motifs, art style notes). Empty object {} is valid when the story has no recurring named locations.
